description: Print session information [alias: i]
Display effective resolved configuration in TOML format
Switch the models [alias: cm]
Switch the model for the current session only, without modifying global config [alias: m]
Reset all session overrides (model, provider, reasoning effort) to use global config [alias: cr]
Set reasoning effort for the current session only [alias: re]
Set the reasoning effort level in global config [alias: cre]
Set the model used for commit message generation [alias: ccm]
Set the model used for command suggestion generation [alias: csm]
Open the global forge config file (~/forge/.forge.toml) in an editor [alias: ce]
Start new conversation [alias: n]
Save conversation as JSON or HTML (use /dump html for HTML format) [alias: d]
List all conversations for the active workspace [alias: c]
Retry the last command [alias: r]
Paste image from clipboard [alias: pv]
Compact the conversation context
Use an external editor to write a prompt
List all available tools with their descriptions and schema [alias: t]
List all available skills
Directly commits AI generated commit message
Previews AI generated commit message
Generate shell commands without executing them [alias: s]
Login to a provider [aliases: login, provider]
Logout from a provider
Select and switch between agents [alias: a]
Sync the current workspace for codebase search [alias: sync]
Show sync status of all workspace files
Show workspace information with sync details
Initialize a new workspace without syncing files
Clone and manage conversation context
Rename the current conversation [alias: rn]
Rename a conversation by ID or interactively
Copy last assistant message to clipboard as raw markdown
Run environment diagnostics for the shell plugin
Display ZSH keyboard shortcuts [alias: kb]
Setup zsh integration by updating .zshrc
